frequency-conditioned attention probing LLM sinusoidal bias mode arxiv 2025

raw_responses.title: Cymatics — Wikipedia
raw_responses.snippet: Source-domain: Hans Jenny's 1960s cymatics; Chladni nodal-line figures on metal plates under resonance.

raw_responses.title: Resonant Modes for Circular and Polygonal Chladni Plates (PMC 2024)
raw_responses.snippet: Source-domain: modal analysis of Chladni plates; eigenmode m,n nodal-line geometry.

raw_responses.title: How Do Chladni Plates Visualize Sound — COMSOL
raw_responses.snippet: Source-domain: Bessel/spherical-harmonic mode structure of vibrating plates.

raw_responses.title: Train Short, Test Long: Attention with Linear Biases (ALiBi)
raw_responses.snippet: LLM-side: adds a fixed linear bias to attention scores for length extrapolation; uses a per-head slope rather than sweepable sinusoid.

raw_responses.title: LM Uncertainty Quantification with Attention Chain (2025)
raw_responses.snippet: LLM-side: attention-chain uncertainty quantification via attention-pattern aggregation; no frequency-sweep diagnostic.

raw_responses.title: Attention Consistency for LLMs Explanation (2025)
raw_responses.snippet: LLM-side: probes attention-pattern consistency under perturbation; relates to interpretability but no resonance-sweep parameter.

raw_responses.title: Attention Sinks in Diffusion Language Models (2510.15731)
raw_responses.snippet: LLM-side: position-specific attention 'sinks' analogous to quiescent positions in nodal language but for streaming attention.

raw_responses.title: Efficient Attention Mechanisms for LLMs: A Survey (2507.19595)
raw_responses.snippet: LLM-side: catalogues linear/sparse/spectral attention; does NOT discuss Chladni-style nodal diagnostics.
